flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Touro University rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.1k → $13.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Touro University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Touro University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 (25.2% → 28.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Touro University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (56.6% → 63.5%).
